params.name: World Hawk
params.description: The World Hawk is one of the most renowned unmanned aircrafts, boasting a range of 25,000 kilometers and an auto-flight time of 41 hours. Equipped with an advanced recon-radar system, this aircraft can collect intelligence over an extensive area. Its commanding system facilitates real-time intelligence transmission, enhancing overall control capabilities for commanders. The practical application of the World Hawk in warfare has paved the way for further advancements and developments in the aviat …
